text.title: Tailwind Architecture Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Next.js + shadcn + Tailwind v3 architecture
example.note: tailwind_version=v3; token_source=tailwind.config.ts; cn_util src/lib/utils.ts with uses_tailwind_merge=true + extendTailwindMerge for `text-brand-*`; extraction_threshold 5/3; lint_rules=[no-arbitrary-values, no-raw-clsx, prettier-plugin-tailwindcss]; dark_mode_strategy=semantic_tokens. Rebrand from blue to brand colour took 4 token edits + one PR; design system stayed cohesive.

example.title: Arbitrary-values brownfield
example.note: Codebase had 600 `w-[Npx]` and 80 `bg-[#hex]`. Tree caught: tokens-in-config-only → migration playbook + lint rule; 2 sprints to clean up.
